title: metrosideros ruscifolia
intro: Metrosideros ruscifolia, also known as the New Zealand Christmas tree or rata, is a flowering evergreen tree native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Metrosideros ruscifolia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
